text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Tannhauser. Do you have any
goals for the year ahead?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that I'm one step closer to being an
adult, I want to be more reliable!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Speaking of reliable, you forgot you're
supposed to clean in front of the school gate,
didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Trusty Turbo covered for you! No biggie, it's your
birthday!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. This morning, you left your
laundry in the dryer. I went ahead and carried it
to your room.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oof... Guess I'm a long ways from being reliable...
